name: Hawaii Community
description_short: This is not a financial services company. GoHawaii.com is the official Hawaiian Islands vacation and travel guide website.
description_long: Hawaii Community (GoHawaii.com) is the official tourism and travel information portal for the Hawaiian Islands, operated to promote vacation planning and tourism to Hawaii. The website functions as a comprehensive travel guide rather than a financial services provider. It offers destination information, travel planning resources, and tourism marketing for visitors considering trips to Hawaii's islands. The site is explicitly designed for vacation planning with sections dedicated to different traveler types (families, foodies, culture enthusiasts, nature lovers, etc.) and detailed information about each Hawaiian island. The company has been miscategorized within the consumer finance database. The website contains no financial products, lending services, credit offerings, or consumer finance functionality of any kind. There are no loan products, credit-building tools, emergency cash services, or payday alternatives offered. The site exclusively provides travel information including island descriptions, inter-island flight times, accommodation suggestions, activity recommendations, dining guides, cultural information, and event listings. For consumers searching CreditDoc for legitimate financial assistance or payday alternatives, this listing provides no relevant services and should be removed from the consumer finance directory.
pros: Comprehensive information about all Hawaiian islands with detailed descriptions
Inter-island travel time and distance information
Segmented content for different traveler types and interests
Accommodations and activities directory for trip planning
Multiple language support and international visitor information
cons: Completely miscategorized as a payday-alternative lender when it is a tourism website
No financial services, lending products, or consumer finance offerings whatsoever
Misleading categorization wastes time for consumers seeking actual financial assistance
No credit products, loan services, or emergency cash options available
Should be removed entirely from consumer finance database
diagnosis: This is NOT a financial services company and should not be listed on CreditDoc. GoHawaii.com is an official tourism and travel information website for vacation planning to the Hawaiian Islands with zero financial products or services.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
